requirement_topic.en: Grid Interconnection — Anti-Islanding and Voltage/Frequency Trip Thresholds
requirement_topic.zh: 并网互联——防孤岛及电压/频率脱网阈值
requirement_topic.zht: 並網互聯——防孤島及電壓/頻率脫網閾值

summary.en: Myanmar operates a 230 V / 50 Hz single-phase residential grid (same frequency as China; nominal voltage differs from China's 220 V domestic standard). MEPE (Myanmar Electric Power Enterprise) and ESE (Electricity Supply Enterprise) are the principal grid operators for urban and peri-urban distribution respectively. Grid-connected PV inverters must comply with MEPE/ESE grid-interconnection rules for net-metering and distributed generation. As of the access date, Myanmar's grid interconnection rules for distributed PV are evolving and not fully codified in a single published technical standard; IEC 62116 (anti-islanding test procedure for utility-interactive PV inverters) and IEC 61727 (PV systems — characteristics of the utility interface) are the primary IEC references cited in MEPE project-level discussions. No mandatory national grid code with specific parameter values (ride-through curves, trip time limits) has been confirmed in publicly available sources.
summary.zh: 缅甸采用230 V/50 Hz单相居民用电网（频率与中国相同；额定电压与中国220 V国内标准不同）。MEPE（缅甸电力企业）和ESE（供电企业）分别是城市及城郊配电网的主要电网运营商。并网光伏逆变器须符合MEPE/ESE关于净计量和分布式发电的并网互联规则。截至查询日期，缅甸分布式光伏并网规则仍在演变，尚未在单一已发布技术标准中完全成文；IEC 62116（并网光伏逆变器防孤岛测试程序）和IEC 61727（光伏系统——公用电网接口特性）是MEPE项目层面讨论中引用的主要IEC参考标准。公开来源中尚未确认具有具体参数值（穿越曲线、脱网时间限值）的强制性国家电网规范。
summary.zht: 緬甸採用230 V/50 Hz單相居民用電網（頻率與中國相同；額定電壓與中國220 V國內標準不同）。MEPE（緬甸電力企業）和ESE（供電企業）分別是城市及城郊配電網的主要電網運營商。並網光伏逆變器須符合MEPE/ESE關於淨計量和分布式發電的並網互聯規則。截至查詢日期，緬甸分布式光伏並網規則仍在演變，尚未在單一已發布技術標準中完全成文；IEC 62116（並網光伏逆變器防孤島測試程序）和IEC 61727（光伏系統——公用電網接口特性）是MEPE項目層面討論中引用的主要IEC參考標準。公開來源中尚未確認具有具體參數值（穿越曲線、脫網時間限值）的強制性國家電網規範。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62116:2014 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters: Test procedure for islanding prevention measures (referenced by MEPE for project-level review)
IEC 61727:2004 — Photovoltaic (PV) systems: Characteristics of the utility interface (referenced by MEPE for project-level review)
MEPE/ESE grid-interconnection procedural requirements (evolving — confirm current version with MEPE directly)

summary.en: China's grid-tied PV inverter anti-islanding and voltage/frequency trip requirements are primarily covered by GB/T 37408-2019 (recommended, technical requirements for PV grid-connected inverters, including anti-islanding, voltage/frequency ride-through, and grid stability functions) and GB/T 19939-2005 (recommended, technical requirements for PV system grid connection, grid interface characteristics). The CGC certification scheme (China General Certification / 鉴衡认证) references these standards and tests anti-islanding per the IEC 62116 methodology, making CGC-certified inverters well-suited for Myanmar project review because the underlying test methodology aligns with MEPE's IEC references. State Grid and CSG connection agreements set site-specific trip parameters within the national standard ranges.
summary.zh: 中国并网光伏逆变器防孤岛和电压/频率脱网要求主要由GB/T 37408-2019（推荐性，光伏并网逆变器技术要求，含防孤岛、电压/频率穿越及电网稳定功能）和GB/T 19939-2005（推荐性，光伏系统并网技术要求，电网接口特性）涵盖。CGC认证方案（鉴衡认证）引用上述标准，并按IEC 62116方法论测试防孤岛性能，使CGC认证逆变器在缅甸项目审查中具有优势，因为底层测试方法论与MEPE的IEC参考标准相符。国家电网和南网并网协议在国家标准范围内设定特定站点的脱网参数。
summary.zht: 中國並網光伏逆變器防孤島和電壓/頻率脫網要求主要由GB/T 37408-2019（推薦性，光伏並網逆變器技術要求，含防孤島、電壓/頻率穿越及電網穩定功能）和GB/T 19939-2005（推薦性，光伏系統並網技術要求，電網接口特性）涵蓋。CGC認證方案（鑒衡認證）引用上述標準，並按IEC 62116方法論測試防孤島性能，使CGC認證逆變器在緬甸項目審查中具有優勢，因為底層測試方法論與MEPE的IEC參考標準相符。國家電網和南網並網協議在國家標準範圍內設定特定站點的脫網參數。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2019 — Technical requirements for PV grid-connected inverters (recommended, incl. anti-islanding and ride-through)
GB/T 19939-2005 — Technical requirements for PV system grid connection (recommended)
CGC voluntary certification (鉴衡认证) — tests anti-islanding per IEC 62116 methodology

gap.en: The voltage nominal difference (Myanmar 230 V vs China 220 V) is the most immediate technical gap: inverters configured with a 220 V nominal AC output reference must be reconfigured or confirmed compatible with 230 V ±10% operation before grid connection in Myanmar. The frequency (50 Hz) is identical — no adjustment required there. The regulatory gap is that Myanmar has not published specific trip-time or ride-through parameter tables, so the exporter cannot pre-certify against a fixed Myanmar grid code. Instead, MEPE project-level approval is required, and IEC 62116/IEC 61727 test reports (which Chinese manufacturers commonly hold from CGC certification) serve as the primary technical evidence. Exporters should verify the inverter's AC voltage configuration range covers 230 V before shipment.
gap.zh: 电压额定值差异（缅甸230 V vs中国220 V）是最直接的技术差距：配置为220 V额定交流输出参考的逆变器，在缅甸并网前须重新配置或确认兼容230 V±10%运行。频率（50 Hz）完全相同，无需调整。监管差距在于缅甸尚未发布具体的脱网时间或穿越参数表，因此出口商无法针对固定的缅甸电网规范进行预认证。取而代之的是MEPE项目层面审批，IEC 62116/IEC 61727测试报告（中国制造商通常通过CGC认证持有）作为主要技术证明。出口商应在出货前确认逆变器的交流电压配置范围涵盖230 V。
gap.zht: 電壓額定值差異（緬甸230 V vs中國220 V）是最直接的技術差距：配置為220 V額定交流輸出參考的逆變器，在緬甸並網前須重新配置或確認兼容230 V±10%運行。頻率（50 Hz）完全相同，無需調整。監管差距在於緬甸尚未發布具體的脫網時間或穿越參數表，因此出口商無法針對固定的緬甸電網規範進行預認證。取而代之的是MEPE項目層面審批，IEC 62116/IEC 61727測試報告（中國製造商通常通過CGC認證持有）作為主要技術證明。出口商應在出貨前確認逆變器的交流電壓配置範圍涵蓋230 V。

mandatory_status.target: Procedurally required for grid connection via MEPE/ESE project approval; no published mandatory national grid code with specific parameter values confirmed as of access date.
mandatory_status.cn: Recommended (GB/T) — but de facto mandatory for State Grid/CSG grid-connection approval in practice.

source.publisher: Ministry of Electricity and Energy (MOEE), Myanmar — parent ministry of MEPE and ESE

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] The key practical steps for China-to-Myanmar grid-tied PV inverter export are: (1) confirm AC voltage range covers 230 V; (2) obtain MEPE/ESE project-level grid-interconnection approval using IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 test reports; (3) secure MIC import permit. CGC-certified inverters with IEC 62116 test reports are well-positioned. This comparison is informational only.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国光伏逆变器出口缅甸并网的主要实际步骤：（1）确认交流电压范围涵盖230 V；（2）使用IEC 62116和IEC 61727测试报告获取MEPE/ESE项目层面并网审批；（3）取得MIC进口许可。持有IEC 62116测试报告的CGC认证逆变器具有优势。本比较仅供参考。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國光伏逆變器出口緬甸並網的主要實際步驟：（1）確認交流電壓範圍涵蓋230 V；（2）使用IEC 62116和IEC 61727測試報告獲取MEPE/ESE項目層面並網審批；（3）取得MIC進口許可。持有IEC 62116測試報告的CGC認證逆變器具有優勢。本比較僅供參考。

requirement_topic.en: Net-Metering and Distributed Generation Policy — MEPE/ESE Framework
requirement_topic.zh: 净计量与分布式发电政策——MEPE/ESE框架
requirement_topic.zht: 淨計量與分布式發電政策——MEPE/ESE框架

summary.en: Myanmar introduced a Net Energy Metering (NEM) pilot framework under the National Energy Management Committee (NEMC) and MOEE. MEPE administers NEM agreements for Yangon and major urban centres; ESE covers peri-urban and some rural areas. The framework allows residential and commercial customers to export excess solar generation to the grid at a feed-in rate set by MOEE/MEPE. NEM approval requires: (a) technical review of inverter specifications (anti-islanding, output voltage compatibility with 230 V / 50 Hz); (b) site inspection; (c) bilateral connection agreement. The NEM policy and tariff rates are evolving — the framework is operational but parameter details change periodically. Inverters must be approved types; MEPE maintains an informal approved-type list based on IEC 62116-tested products.
summary.zh: 缅甸在国家能源管理委员会（NEMC）和MOEE框架下启动了净能源计量（NEM）试点。MEPE负责管理仰光及主要城市中心的NEM协议；ESE负责城郊及部分农村地区。该框架允许住宅和商业用户按MOEE/MEPE设定的上网电价将多余太阳能发电量输入电网。NEM审批要求：（a）对逆变器规格进行技术审查（防孤岛、输出电压与230 V/50 Hz的兼容性）；（b）现场检查；（c）双边并网协议。NEM政策和电价正在演变——框架已运行，但参数细节定期变化。逆变器须为经审批的型号；MEPE基于通过IEC 62116测试的产品维护非正式的审批型号清单。
summary.zht: 緬甸在國家能源管理委員會（NEMC）和MOEE框架下啟動了淨能源計量（NEM）試點。MEPE負責管理仰光及主要城市中心的NEM協議；ESE負責城郊及部分農村地區。該框架允許住宅和商業用戶按MOEE/MEPE設定的上網電價將多餘太陽能發電量輸入電網。NEM審批要求：（a）對逆變器規格進行技術審查（防孤島、輸出電壓與230 V/50 Hz的兼容性）；（b）現場檢查；（c）雙邊並網協議。NEM政策和電價正在演變——框架已運行，但參數細節定期變化。逆變器須為經審批的型號；MEPE基於通過IEC 62116測試的產品維護非正式的審批型號清單。

standards_or_laws: Myanmar Net Energy Metering framework under MOEE/NEMC (evolving — confirm current rules with MEPE/ESE directly)
IEC 62116:2014 — referenced in MEPE inverter type-approval informal process

summary.en: China's distributed PV net-metering equivalent is the distributed generation (分布式发电) policy administered by NEA and NDRC, with grid connection managed by State Grid and CSG under the 《分布式发电管理暂行办法》framework. Inverters are subject to type-test approval (型式试验报告) and must be listed in approved equipment catalogues maintained by State Grid or CSG for net-metering project registration. This State Grid/CSG type-approval process — requiring GB/T 37408 and IEC 62116-aligned test reports — is broadly analogous to what MEPE requires for its informal approved-type list, making compliant Chinese inverters readily adaptable for Myanmar NEM project submissions.
summary.zh: 中国的分布式光伏净计量等效政策是由国家能源局（NEA）和国家发改委（NDRC）管理的分布式发电政策，并网由国家电网和南网依据《分布式发电管理暂行办法》框架管理。逆变器须通过型式试验报告审批，并须列入国家电网或南网维护的净计量项目注册设备认可目录。该国家电网/南网型式审批流程——要求GB/T 37408和IEC 62116对齐的测试报告——与MEPE对其非正式审批型号清单的要求基本类似，使合规的中国逆变器能够顺利适配缅甸NEM项目申报。
summary.zht: 中國的分布式光伏淨計量等效政策是由國家能源局（NEA）和國家發改委（NDRC）管理的分布式發電政策，並網由國家電網和南網依據《分布式發電管理暫行辦法》框架管理。逆變器須通過型式試驗報告審批，並須列入國家電網或南網維護的淨計量項目注冊設備認可目錄。該國家電網/南網型式審批流程——要求GB/T 37408和IEC 62116對齊的測試報告——與MEPE對其非正式審批型號清單的要求基本類似，使合規的中國逆變器能夠順利適配緬甸NEM項目申報。

standards_or_laws: 《分布式发电管理暂行办法》(NEA/NDRC distributed generation management interim rules)
State Grid/CSG distributed PV inverter type-approval catalogue requirements

gap.en: The principal gap is institutional rather than technical: Myanmar's NEM approval is a project-level bilateral agreement with MEPE/ESE, not a national type-certification programme. This means the exporter cannot obtain a single Myanmar-market type approval that covers all project sites — each installation may require a separate MEPE technical review. Chinese exporters should prepare: inverter specification sheets (in English), IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 test reports, a one-page technical summary of voltage/frequency range covering 230 V/50 Hz, and an MIC import permit. MEPE's informal approved-type list can shorten subsequent project approvals once a model is accepted. Tariff rates and NEM policy details change — always verify the current MOEE NEM circular before contracting.
gap.zh: 主要差距是制度层面而非技术层面：缅甸NEM审批是与MEPE/ESE的项目层面双边协议，而非国家型式认证计划。这意味着出口商无法获得覆盖所有项目站点的单一缅甸市场型式批准——每个安装项目可能需要单独的MEPE技术审查。中国出口商应准备：逆变器规格表（英文）、IEC 62116和IEC 61727测试报告、涵盖230 V/50 Hz电压/频率范围的一页技术摘要，以及MIC进口许可。一旦某型号获得认可，MEPE的非正式审批型号清单可缩短后续项目审批时间。电价和NEM政策细节会发生变化——合同签订前务必核实当前MOEE NEM通知。
gap.zht: 主要差距是制度層面而非技術層面：緬甸NEM審批是與MEPE/ESE的項目層面雙邊協議，而非國家型式認證計劃。這意味著出口商無法獲得覆蓋所有項目站點的單一緬甸市場型式批准——每個安裝項目可能需要單獨的MEPE技術審查。中國出口商應準備：逆變器規格表（英文）、IEC 62116和IEC 61727測試報告、涵蓋230 V/50 Hz電壓/頻率範圍的一頁技術摘要，以及MIC進口許可。一旦某型號獲得認可，MEPE的非正式審批型號清單可縮短後續項目審批時間。電價和NEM政策細節會發生變化——合同簽訂前務必核實當前MOEE NEM通知。

mandatory_status.target: NEM grid connection requires bilateral MEPE/ESE approval on a project-by-project basis. No single national type-certification scheme confirmed as of access date.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory project-level grid connection approval required by State Grid/CSG under NEA/NDRC distributed generation rules.

source.publisher: Ministry of Electricity and Energy (MOEE), Myanmar

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Myanmar's NEM framework requires project-level MEPE/ESE approval rather than a pre-certified product mark. IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 test reports are the primary technical evidence; voltage compatibility with 230 V / 50 Hz must be confirmed. MIC import permit is a parallel requirement. Verify current NEM tariff and policy circulars with MOEE before contracting.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 缅甸NEM框架要求项目层面的MEPE/ESE审批，而非预认证产品标志。IEC 62116和IEC 61727测试报告是主要技术证明；须确认与230 V/50 Hz的电压兼容性。MIC进口许可是并行要求。合同签订前请向MOEE核实当前NEM电价和政策通知。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 緬甸NEM框架要求項目層面的MEPE/ESE審批，而非預認證產品標誌。IEC 62116和IEC 61727測試報告是主要技術證明；須確認與230 V/50 Hz的電壓兼容性。MIC進口許可是並行要求。合同簽訂前請向MOEE核實當前NEM電價和政策通知。
